summary: Iteration 262 - Cantiere Pre-fill Fix Testing Complete. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Verified: 1) Address regex parsing works for 'Via X, Citta (PROV)' pattern, 2) crea_cantiere() pre-fills attivita_cantiere from commessa.description, 3) crea_cantiere() parses and splits indirizzo/citta/provincia from commessa.cantiere.indirizzo, 4) crea_cantiere() pre-fills COMMITTENTE soggetto with client business_name and email, 5) crea_cantiere() stores commessa_numero, commessa_title, client_name for list display, 6) list_cantieri() enriches cantieri with client_name and commessa reference, 7) All RBAC endpoints return 401 without auth, 8) Health check returns 200.
critical_code_review_comments: crea_cantiere() correctly pre-fills attivita_cantiere from commessa.oggetto or commessa.description
Address regex pattern r'^(.+?),\s*(.+?)(?:\s*\((\w{2})\))?$' correctly parses 'Via Porrettana 156, Sasso Marconi (BO)' into 3 parts
_set_soggetto() helper correctly sets COMMITTENTE with client data and status='precompilato'
list_cantieri() enriches cantieri with client_name and commessa_numero/title from commessa when not stored directly
All RBAC protection working - endpoints return 401 without auth cookie
seed_data_creation: Test commessa 'comm_sasso_marconi' and client 'cli_sasso_marconi' created if not existing. Test cantieri cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cantiere pre-fill fix verified. Key test data: commessa_id='comm_sasso_marconi', user_id='user_97c773827822', client_id='cli_sasso_marconi'. The crea_cantiere() function now correctly pre-fills: attivita_cantiere, indirizzo/citta/provincia (parsed from 'Via X, Citta (PROV)' pattern), COMMITTENTE soggetto with client data, and stores commessa/client references for list display.
